summary: Comprehensive testing of M2M (Month-to-Month) feature. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All core M2M features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Create tenant with is_m2m=true - PASSED
Backend: Create tenant with is_m2m=false - PASSED
Backend: Create Airbnb tenant (M2M not applicable) - PASSED
Backend: Update tenant to enable M2M - PASSED
Backend: Update tenant to disable M2M - PASSED
Backend: extend-month endpoint success for M2M tenant - PASSED
Backend: extend-month rejects non-M2M tenant (400) - PASSED
Backend: extend-month rejects Airbnb tenant (400) - PASSED
Backend: extend-month returns 404 for non-existent tenant - PASSED
Backend: Calendar timeline includes is_m2m field - PASSED
Backend: Tenants list includes is_m2m field - PASSED
Frontend: M2M toggle visible in tenant form when Airbnb OFF - VERIFIED
Frontend: M2M toggle hidden when Airbnb toggle ON - VERIFIED
Frontend: M2M toggle reappears when Airbnb toggle OFF - VERIFIED
Frontend: Creating tenant with M2M enabled saves correctly - VERIFIED
Frontend: M2M badge appears in tenant row (data-testid='m2m-badge') - VERIFIED
Frontend: M2M badge appears in tenant detail dialog (data-testid='m2m-detail-badge') - VERIFIED
Frontend: +1 Month button appears for M2M tenants (data-testid='m2m-extend-button') - VERIFIED
Frontend: +1 Month button extends move_out_date by 30 days - VERIFIED (03/01/27 -> 03/31/27)
Frontend: Success toast shown after extension - VERIFIED
Frontend: M2M badge appears in calendar timeline tooltip - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_M2M_UI_Tenant for UI testing (cleaned up after tests). Existing 'test' tenant has is_m2m=true.
context_for_next_testing_agent: M2M feature fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: tenants-m2m-toggle (form), m2m-badge (row), m2m-detail-badge (detail dialog), m2m-extend-button (extend button). The extend-month endpoint is at POST /api/tenants/{id}/extend-month. Parking assign dialog M2M badge was not directly tested due to page loading issues, but code review confirms implementation is correct in ParkingAssignDialog.js line 116.

m2m_toggle_in_form.notes: Toggle appears only for long-term tenants (not Airbnb), correctly hides/shows based on Airbnb toggle state

m2m_badge_in_tenant_row.notes: Badge with data-testid='m2m-badge' appears next to tenant name in table rows

m2m_badge_in_detail_dialog.notes: Badge with data-testid='m2m-detail-badge' appears in tenant detail dialog header

extend_month_button.notes: Button with data-testid='m2m-extend-button' appears only for M2M tenants, adds 30 days to move_out_date

extend_month_api.notes: POST /api/tenants/{id}/extend-month validates is_m2m=true and is_airbnb_vrbo=false, updates move_out_date, cleaning records, and notifications

calendar_timeline_m2m.notes: is_m2m field included in booking data, M2M badge shown in tooltip

parking_assign_m2m.notes: M2M badge implementation verified in ParkingAssignDialog.js line 116, page had loading issues during UI test

tenant_detail_modal_m2m.notes: M2M badge implementation verified in TenantDetailModal.js lines 103-105
